**No external image generation API is used anywhere.** Every persona avatar GIF is generated entirely with pure Python using the **Pillow (PIL) library** — pixel by pixel, drawn programmatically.

## Script locations and structure

There is no single "master" avatar generation script. Instead, the system has a collection of per-persona scripts:
